allow: PowerShell(Get-Service -Name TermService, SessionEnv, UmRdpService, sshd, ssh-agent -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 22, 3389 } | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell($ts = Get-Command tailscale -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($ts\) { & $ts.Source status } else { 'tailscale CLI not found on PATH' })

PowerShell($dotnet = Get-Command dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($dotnet\) { "dotnet: $\($dotnet.Source\)"; dotnet --version; "---SDKs---"; dotnet --list-sdks; "---Runtimes---"; dotnet --list-runtimes } else { "dotnet not found on PATH" })

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process PostXING.App -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; if \(\\$?\) { Write-Host 'launched and killed cleanly' } else { Write-Host 'no process found' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process PostXING.App -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; if \(\\$?\) { Write-Host 'app launched and killed cleanly' } else { Write-Host 'process not found' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process PostXING.App -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; if \(\\$?\) { Write-Host '== dotnet run launched the app ==' } else { Write-Host '!! process not found' }")
